common.legalReviewPending: This page is a placeholder. Final legal content requires professional review before launch.
common.marketplaceLaunching: Marketplace catalogue launches in a later phase.

announcement.message: Trimnexa is building Cameroon's trusted multi-vendor marketplace — seller applications opening soon.

footer.tagline: Cameroon's trusted multi-vendor marketplace. Secure payments in FCFA.
footer.newsletterDescription: Get updates on launch cities, seller onboarding, and marketplace news.
footer.newsletterNote: Newsletter signup will be enabled before launch.

home.metaDescription: Trimnexa connects verified local sellers with customers through secure FCFA payments and bilingual support.
home.heroTitle: Shop local. Pay securely. Trust Trimnexa.
home.heroSubtitle: Discover verified sellers, transparent pricing in FCFA, and buyer protection designed for Cameroon.
home.featuredCategoriesSubtitle: Browse popular departments — full catalogue coming soon.
home.placeholderGrid: Product listings will appear here when the marketplace catalogue launches.
home.trustSecureDesc: Mobile money and card payments in XAF/FCFA with verified transaction records.
home.trustVerifiedDesc: Seller applications reviewed before shops go live on the platform.
home.trustSupportDesc: Clear order tracking, help centre, and dispute processes.
home.sellerCtaDesc: Reach customers across Cameroon with a professional shop, secure payouts, and seller tools.

about.metaDescription: Learn about Trimnexa's mission to build Cameroon's most trusted digital marketplace.
about.title: About Trimnexa
about.intro: Trimnexa is building a trusted multi-vendor e-commerce marketplace for Cameroon — connecting verified local sellers with customers through secure technology and bilingual support.
about.vision: To build the most trusted digital marketplace in Cameroon, empowering local businesses through secure technology, exceptional customer experience, and modern e-commerce.
about.valueTrust: Trust — verified sellers, secure payments, and transparent policies.
about.valueLocal: Local first — designed for Cameroonian shoppers and businesses.
about.valueAccess: Accessibility — mobile-first, bilingual, and inclusive by design.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with the Trimnexa team for support, partnerships, and general enquiries.
contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: We are here to help with general enquiries, seller interest, and partnership questions.
contact.name: Full name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.formNote: Contact form submission will be connected in a later phase. For now, please email hello@trimnexa.com.
contact.responseTime: We aim to respond within 2 business days.

help.metaDescription: Find answers about shopping, orders, returns, and selling on Trimnexa.
help.title: Help centre
help.intro: Browse common topics. Detailed help articles will expand as marketplace features launch.
help.topicOrdersDesc: Track orders, delivery updates, and address changes.
help.topicPaymentsDesc: Payment methods, receipts, and payment issues.
help.topicReturnsDesc: Return eligibility, refund timelines, and disputes.
help.topicSellingDesc: Seller application, shop setup, and payouts.

becomeSeller.metaDescription: Apply to sell on Trimnexa and reach customers across Cameroon.
becomeSeller.title: Become a seller on Trimnexa
becomeSeller.intro: Join a marketplace built for Cameroonian businesses. Seller onboarding and application review launch in a later development phase.
becomeSeller.benefitReachDesc: Showcase products to shoppers searching across categories and cities.
becomeSeller.benefitToolsDesc: Manage products, orders, and earnings from a dedicated seller dashboard.
becomeSeller.benefitPayoutsDesc: Transparent commissions and payout tracking after order fulfilment.
becomeSeller.ctaNote: The seller application form will be available in Phase 6.

search.title: Search
search.noQuery: Enter a search term to find products, brands, and categories.
search.placeholder: Full product search launches with the marketplace catalogue in Phase 8.

errors.notFoundMessage: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have been moved.
errors.serverErrorMessage: We are working to fix the problem. Please try again later.
